modules.name: google-bridge
modules.description: Unified Google Workspace bridge for Calendar, Tasks, Gmail, Drive, Contacts, Keep, Chat, Meet, Docs, and Sheets.

modules.name: research
modules.description: Research assistant with local context and follow-up memory.

modules.name: weather
modules.description: Offline-first weather snapshots and spoken forecasts.

modules.name: news
modules.description: RSS-powered daily digest with local summarization fallback.

modules.name: health-tracker
modules.description: Local-first logging for steps, sleep, weight, heart rate, and custom health metrics.

modules.name: habit-streak
modules.description: Track daily habits and streaks. Voice check-in. Milestone celebrations.

modules.name: planning-assistant
modules.description: Personal planning assistant with goal decomposition, scheduling, and life-graph writes.

modules.name: notification-bridge
modules.description: Event-driven webhook bridge for fan-in topic subscriptions and outbound notification delivery.

modules.name: email-summarizer
modules.description: Fetch and summarize unread emails locally via IMAP. No cloud required.

modules.name: smart-home
modules.description: Bridge LifeOS intents to Home Assistant and MQTT devices.
